description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, slender blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears metallic, with a smooth, reflective surface and a central ridge running along its length. The crossguard is simple and straight, extending horizontally on both sides, providing hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and textured for grip, ending in a rounded pommel that may aid in balance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements. The coloration is predominantly metallic gray, suggesting a steel or similar alloy construction.
description: A straight, double-edged sword with a metallic blade, simple crossguard, and cylindrical handle, all in a uniform gray color.
description_view_0: The sword is seen edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: The sword is viewed from the flat side, revealing the full width of the blade, crossguard, and handle details.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, mirroring view 0, with the thinness of the blade and handle visible.
description_view_3: A repeat of the flat side view, similar to view 1, showing the blade, crossguard, and handle in full width.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured, metallic or plastic, rounded pommel
